title: Coverage after removing the Programs / Field Landscape panel

removed_ui.panel: Dedicated academic-program cards between Graph Workspace and Resource Navigator
removed_ui.last_rendered_scope: Only `category: academic` rows from `programs_summary.json` were shown there; other categories in that file were already directed to Resource Navigator.

where_content_lives_now.programs_and_curricula: Resource Navigator → Programs & Curricula (PC). Academic program rows from `programs_summary.json` are merged in at load time when their normalized title is not already present in `icicle_resources.json`.
where_content_lives_now.people_events_tools_orgs: Resource Navigator content types PP, CE, TP, CO, GL, etc., plus graph node selection.
where_content_lives_now.papers: Papers and Artifacts — seed papers (`papers_seed.json`) and one-hop expansion (`papers_one_hop.json`), clustered by topic.

not_fully_covered_below.detail: Many later rows use categories such as `grey_literature` or `academic_papers` as bibliographic cards. They are not automatically the same set as OpenAlex papers in Papers and Artifacts; duplicates and gaps are possible.

Explicit edges from a named degree program to every evaluation or case-study paper about that program are not guaranteed. The graph links topics, concepts, papers, and resources, but not a full program→paper bibliography.

not_fully_covered_below.area: Narrative blurbs only on merged program rows
not_fully_covered_below.detail: Navigator rows show title, URL when present, and context text. The old panel showed the same summaries for academics; no unique prose was lost for those that dedupe into existing ICICLE rows.

paper_coverage_priorities: For each major academic program (e.g. LENS, HCII/OLI stack, LEVI), ensure seed or hop papers explicitly discuss or evaluate that program where such literature exists.
When adding hop papers, prefer works that connect implementation (platform/program) to outcomes — bridges Programs & Curricula and Papers and Artifacts.
Use topic codes on papers (T13 high-consequence domains, T06 ITS, etc.) to align program resources with the same topics for graph navigation.
Reconcile `programs_summary.json` items tagged `academic_papers` against `papers_seed.json` / `papers_one_hop.json` so bibliography cards do not drift from the live paper list.
